reviews.comment:
Aceptable pero son moooiiii lentos!!!! Por eso siempre hay fila tan larga!!! Charlan entre los playeros, demoran mucho con cada vehículo... No sé! 🤷🏼‍♀️

(Translated by Google)
Acceptable, but they're sooooo slow!!!! That's why there's always such a long line!!! The attendants chat amongst themselves, they take forever with each vehicle... I don't know! 🤷🏼‍♀️

reviews.comment:
Aceptan cupones, descuentos sin inconvenientes son muy amables.

(Translated by Google)
They accept coupons, offer discounts without any problems, and are very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlam8teFRnEAE

reviews.comment:
El combustible es barato pero la atención de los playeros es exasperantemente lenta. Nunca en mi vida vi tal nivel de vagancia, hacen todo lento, hablan entre ellos como si estuvieran en un bar. Pasas un lunes 9am y hay cola, pasas un feriado 04am y también, no importa el horario siempre habrá gente esperando por la inoperancia de los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
Fuel is cheap, but the service at the gas stations is infuriatingly slow. I've never seen such laziness in my life; they do everything at a snail's pace, chatting amongst themselves like they're in a bar. You go by at 9 a.m. on a Monday and there's a line, you go by at 4 a.m. on a holiday and there's still a line—no matter the time, there will always be people waiting because of the gas station attendants' incompetence.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlanBXZDZnRRAB
